meta.label: EN
meta.htmlDescription: Full-stack engineer (Java/Spring + Angular) and DevSecOps practitioner based in Ariana, Tunisia. I build and operate production web platforms end to end.

hero.lede: I build and operate production web platforms end to end — from Spring Boot APIs and Angular front ends to the CI/CD pipelines and hardened VPS infrastructure they run on.

about.label: whoami
about.p1: I'm a full-stack engineer based in Ariana, Tunisia, with an engineering degree from ESPRIT. At Sodalite Soft Solutions I own features from the database schema all the way to the Nginx config in front of them.
about.p2: My comfort zone is the part most developers hand off: shipping the thing, then keeping it alive in production. I've rebuilt compromised infrastructure from scratch, hardened it, and put monitoring in front of it — which you'll see reflected in the way I build.

items.name: Avis Loco
items.blurb: Google Business reputation management platform. Owners connect their profiles to monitor reviews, reply, and track performance metrics across locations.
items.detail: Built the Spring Boot backend around the Google Business Profile API — OAuth 2.0 token refresh, a reviews proxy, performance metrics and reply endpoints — with Caffeine-backed caching on the Places API and Flyway migrations (including a repeatable Java migration for category deduplication). Angular front end, JTE email templates, full password-reset flow.

items.name: SuperMis
items.blurb: Driving-school management application (app.supermis.fr) — scheduling, student tracking, billing and document generation for French auto-écoles.
items.detail: Angular + Spring Boot + PostgreSQL with a FullCalendar-based scheduler, PDF generation for invoices and student evaluation sheets, and a full GitLab CI/CD pipeline deploying to VPS infrastructure via self-hosted runners.

items.name: Compta Pro
items.blurb: A full-featured accounting application built as a demonstration of end-to-end product capability.
items.detail: React front end on a Spring Boot backend — invoicing, ledgers and reporting — used as a reference implementation for clean architecture and a polished UI.

items.name: AquaGuard E-shop
items.blurb: Social e-commerce platform with a redeemable rewards system.
items.detail: Development of a social e-commerce platform with a redeemable rewards system. Mobile app built with SwiftUI and Flutter.

items.name: CrossChat SDK
items.blurb: Cross-platform messaging SDK for web and mobile applications.
items.detail: Created a cross-platform messaging SDK for web and mobile applications. JWT-based authentication. Deployed and hosted on Azure.

items.name: Ticket Buyer
items.detail: Developed an online event reservation web application. Authentication implemented with AWS Cognito. AWS Lambda for serverless functions and DynamoDB for data management.

experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer
experience.body: Designing, building and operating production web platforms end to end — Angular front ends, Spring Boot APIs, PostgreSQL, and the Dockerized CI/CD and VPS infrastructure they run on. Day-to-day across GitLab CI, Jenkins and Nginx.

experience.title: Freelance Developer
experience.body: Shipping web and mobile products for clients on the MERN stack, NestJS and AWS — from greenfield builds to infrastructure and deployment.

contact.text: Open to full-time roles and freelance work. The fastest way to reach me is email — I reply within a day.

footer.credit: built with Astro · deployed on VPS
